productDisplayName: Maxima Men Off White Dial Watch
description: Classic meets elegance in this maxima watch. It transitions perfectly from day to night. The new range of watches are a fresh take on the Ssteele eye for perfection and are great for urban wear. Case diameter: 44 mm Case thickness: 11 mm Dial shape: Round Warranty: 1 year Stainless steel case with a fixed bezel and a steel strap Ssteele logo at the 12-hour mark Tang clasp with an off white dial, metallic numbers and hands Date aperture at the 3-hour mark Screw to reset time Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 30 meters -wearable while washing hands and in mild rain Comes in an authentic Maxima tin case
